title: cordula nivea
intro: Cordula nivea, also known as White Cordia, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Buxaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cordula nivea include reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions, and aiding in the management of fever. It can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
